segments.text: That's explosive, but he's adding even more risk
segments.original_text: 爆弾ですが、そこにこうしてリスクをつけて
バーストイーブンです
ビハインドは大きいですが

segments.text: But he showed earlier he could reverse from a spot like this
segments.original_text: 先ほどもこういう状況からまくってみせた

full_text: That's explosive, but he's adding even more risk Burst even 81.8! Huge deficit though But he showed earlier he could reverse from a spot like this

corrections.original: バーストスクイーブン
corrections.rule: misheard: スクイーブン→イーブン
